lines.line: មិនដឹងថាអូនមកពីណា ផូផង់ហើយស្រស់ដូចផ្កា
lines.translation: I do not know where you come from, beautiful and fresh like a flower
lines.phonetic: mindoeng tha aun mk pinea  phau phng haey srasa dauch phka

lines.line: វង់ភក្ត្រជីវ៉ា អោយបងវង្វេង
lines.translation: Chiva's face makes you wander
lines.phonetic: vngphoktr chivea  aoy bng vongveng

lines.line: ពេលនេះមិនដឹងថា គួរដើរទៅតាមផ្លូវណា
lines.translation: Now do not know which way to go
lines.phonetic: pelnih mindoeng tha  kuor daertow tamophlauv na

lines.line: មិត្តភក្តិឬក៏ស្នេហា គួរតែបត់ស្ដាំឬក៏បត់ឆ្វេង
lines.translation: Friends or love should turn right or turn left
lines.phonetic: mitt phokte ryyka snehea  kuorte btsdam ryyka btchhveng

words.word: មិត្តភក្តិ

lines.line: But women always right You're the buzz
lines.translation: But women always right You're the buzz
lines.phonetic: but women always right you're the buzz

lines.translation: up to my light or I think alone now
lines.phonetic: up to my light  ryyka bng nih kit mneakeng pelnih

lines.translation: Baby girls you're shining bright
lines.phonetic: min chng saamdeng baby girls you're shining bright

lines.line: ទោះបីបងឃើញ at night រូបអូននេះនៅ shining bright
lines.translation: Even though I saw this lion at night shining bright
lines.phonetic: tohbei bng kheunh at night  roub aun nih now shining bright

lines.line: Can't get you off my i, Can't get you off my mind
lines.translation: Can't get you off my i, Can't get you off my mind
lines.phonetic: can't get you off my i, can't get you off my mind

lines.phonetic: tohbei pel bng keng  bng ka nukkheunh aun der
